title: Metadata
description: Schema for core identifying metadata about a charity, such as names, web domains, and tax identifiers.

chinese_name.description: The official Chinese name of the charity.

aliases.description: A list of commonly used acronyms or alternative names for the charity

items.description: Commonly used acronyms or alternative names for the charity (e.g., 'SPCA', 'WWF-HK').

domains.description: A list of official website domains associated with the charity.

registration_id.description: The official non-profit registration identifier for the charity's jurisdiction (e.g., HK s88 ID, US EIN, UK Charity Number).
